description: Unit test product-specific step derivation: PSA includes all existing steps and AlgaDesk excludes Billing while keeping required workspace/ticketing positions correct.
Contract/unit test the onboarding page passes productCode into OnboardingWizard from ProductProvider.
Source/contract test that AlgaDesk-specific wizard copy exists while PSA defaults remain available.
Regression check existing onboarding data separation tests still pass for tenantName vs user-specific fields.
Contract test every onboarding locale defines the AlgaDesk wizard shell and workspace step translation keys.
